60.reason: [Error: n now holds the number of edges, but the loop should iterate over the number of edges, not vertices. However, the original vertex count is lost, causing incorrect behavior.]

reasons.buggy-deepseek-chat-1: 1.0 , reason:  [Error: n now holds the number of edges, but the loop should iterate over the number of edges, not vertices. However, the original vertex count is lost, causing incorrect behavior.]
reasons.buggy-deepseek-chat-2: 1.0 , reason:  [Error: The loop uses n (vertex count) as the limit, but it should use the edge count (m). This will cause incorrect reading of edges if n != m.]
reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-1: 0.25 , reason:  错误：for 循环中使用 int i 声明是 C99 特性，C89 不允许；且此处 n 应为边数 m，而非顶点数
reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-2: 0.16666666666666666 , reason:  [错误：循环次数应为边的数量，而不是顶点数n]
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-1: 0.5 , reason:  错误：读取边的循环次数应为输入的边数m，而不是顶点数n。应改为for (int i = 0; i < m; i++)
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-2: 1.0 , reason:  Error: The loop should iterate 'm' times (number of edges) to read all edges, not 'n' times (number of vertices).
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-1: 0.5 , reason:  [错误：循环次数应为边数m，但使用了n（顶点数），因为前面scanf错误导致m丢失]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-2: 0.5 , reason:  [错误：循环次数应为边数m，但此时n已被覆盖为边数，而原意是用另一个变量m；然而由于上一行错误，这里n实际是边数，但逻辑混乱且若输入顶点数≠边数则出错]

52.code: scanf("%d %d", &n, &n); // 读取顶点和边的数量
52.reason: 错误：将顶点数n和边数m都读入到了变量n中，导致n的值被边数覆盖，后续遍历循环边界错误。应声明变量m并改为scanf("%d %d", &n, &m);

reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-1: 0.25 , reason:  此处错误：应使用两个不同的变量分别存储顶点数和边数，例如 int m; scanf("%d %d", &n, &m);
reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-2: 0.16666666666666666 , reason:  [错误：第二个n应为边的数量，应使用不同变量，否则丢失边数]
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-1: 0.5 , reason:  错误：将顶点数n和边数m都读入到了变量n中，导致n的值被边数覆盖，后续遍历循环边界错误。应声明变量m并改为scanf("%d %d", &n, &m);
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-1: 0.5 , reason:  [错误：第二个参数应为边数m，但错误地再次读入n，导致边数被覆盖为顶点数]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-2: 0.5 , reason:  [错误：第二个参数应为边数m，但错误地再次读入到n，导致边数被覆盖且后续循环次数错误]
